arts.ttl: Disillusioned Rangers diehards vote with their feet as fan fury triggers battle royale to shift Ibrox tickets
arts.sum: Philippe Clement and the Ibrox hierarchy are under huge pressure due to a woeful Premiership campaign

arts.ttl: 'Rangers look broken' Kris Boyd makes interim manager stance clear and reveals hunch over next weekend
arts.sum: The former Ibrox hero insists Rangers are going nowhere under Philippe Clement's leadership
Rangers chief executive Patrick Stewart says manager Philippe Clement has the board's backing despite a 15-point deficit to Celtic, as he announced a review of all football operations at the club.

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement: Sack decision confirmed as Rangers CEO issues update on under-fire manager
arts.sum: Rangers CEO Patrick Stewart issues an update on the future of under-fire manager Philippe Clement, who has won just two of his last eight games in charge of the Gers.

arts.ttl: Patrick Stewart reveals Rangers January transfer plan as Ibrox chief outlines Hamza Igamane stance
arts.sum: Stewart has promised to back Clement in the January transfer window - but insists the days of quick fixes are over at Ibrox
Rangers chief executive Patrick Stewart says manager Philippe Clement has the board's backing despite a 15-point deficit to Celtic, as he announced a review of all football operations at the club.

arts.ttl: Every word of Patrick Stewart's first Rangers address as new CEO responds to fan fury and promises root-and-branch review
arts.sum: The former Manchester United chief officially started his work at Ibrox in the middle of December and has now outlined his plans

arts.ttl: Clement to stay as Rangers launch review of club | January plans revealed
arts.sum: Rangers CEO Patrick Stewart has revealed Philippe Clement will remain the club's manager despite growing pressure from supporters.

arts.ttl: 'Changing manager not a silver bullet' – Rangers back under-pressure Clement

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement SAFE at Rangers for now but CEO Patrick Stewart sets beleaguered boss one condition to keep job
arts.sum: The Belgian is under huge pressure after falling so far behind in the Scottish Premiership due to a woeful run of away results
